title: Vitalvet: How can we help?
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a veterinary...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a veterinary health and retail group in the Garden Route with branches in George and Mossel Bay.


> Nestled in the heart of George, you will find our York Street branch where you will receive professional advice from trained veterinary receptionists, extensive preventive care options and service excellence with the team always going the extra mile for clients and pets.


The focus at Vitalvet in York Street is primary animal health, prioritising vaccinations, microchipping, deworming, and tick and flea remedies. We stock a wide range of premium pet food, supplements and wellness products.

The veterinary receptionists thoroughly answer any questions you may have, making sure clients feel informed and confident, sourcing specific products should you have such a request and treating every pet with genuine compassion and dedication.

Some of Vitalvet’s friendly staff members have been a part of the business for more than 10 years. They have grown together as a team, a practice and a trusted name in veterinary care, building lasting relationships with clients and their pets along the way.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
